chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1598 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.4250/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.4251/2023. 11.02.2026 Mr. Aftab Memon, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2023 without any progress. Diary demonstrates that in the past three years no efforts have taken by the applicant to get the matter listed. On 23.12.2025 following order was passed: “23.12.2025 Mr. Aftab Memon, advocate for applicant. This reference is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even today, learned counsel is unable to articulate any question of law arising out of the impugned judgment. As an indulgence, to come up after four weeks.“ Today counsel for the applicant merely seeks time. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
